MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Motion for Order to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiffs TERESA HALEY as wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor - in Interest to HENRY HALEY, deceased; and AMBER WILSEY, AUTUMN HALEY, BRANDON HALEY, KATHLEEN HALEY, TRAPPER BONAR, a Minor, by and through his Guardian ad Litem, AMBER WILSEY, as Wrongful Death Heirs of HENRY HALEY, deceased ("plaintiffs").
Witness TERESA HALEY appeared by Court Call, sworn and testified.
No appearance by Plaintiffs AMBER WILSEY, AUTUMN HALEY, BRANDON HALEY, KATHLEEN HALEY, TRAPPER BONAR, a Minor, by and through his Guardian ad Litem, AMBER WILSEY.

After hearing the testimony and considered the evidence both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, the Court ordered for distribution of all net settlements funds derived from the personal injury - survival and wrongful death cause of action as following proportions:
TERESA HALEY 90%
AMBER WILSEY 0%
AUTUMN HALEY 0%
BRANDON HALEY 0%
KATHLEEN HALEY 10%
TRAPPER BONAR, a Minor, by and through his Guardian ad Litem, AMBER WILSEY 0%

The Signature of plaintiff Theresa Haley alone is sufficient to bind the estate and wrongful death heirs on all settlement documents.

Order was submitted to and signed by the Court.
